name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Chinese spokesperson emphasizes that the delay of Trump's visit has "nothing to do" with Strait of Hormuz navigation.

name: Solar (Solana中文社群)
fullText:
“三年后 Solana 上成熟的自托管方案，将是‘隐形的’。用户甚至不会意识到自己正在与加密技术交互。”

@solflare 的 Co-founder @vidor_solflare 谈及 Solana 上自托管的未来：它将变得无感、隐形，你甚至不会察觉到这背后是加密技术。 https://t.co/kKFxX877gH

name: allincrypto 熬鹰资本 🇨🇳
fullText: 溜了，日线八连阳，今天早上收盘给断了，等横个几天看看情况。

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Turkish ​Foreign Minister reiterates that ‌Turkey is ready to host the next round of negotiations between Russia and Ukraine.
